items.content:

items.content:

items.title: Meet care home robot Abi
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A humanoid robot named Abi, developed by a Melbourne-based startup, is helping combat loneliness among residents in Australian aged care facilities. Andromeda Robotics founder and CEO, Grace Brown, says some older adults "don't see her as a robot, they see her as a friend."
 
#robot #carehome #elderly #loneliness #age</article>

items.title: WARNING: GRAPHIC CONTENT: Sectarian clashes in Syria devastate Sweida's main hospital | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>THIS VIDEO CONTAINS SENSITIVE FOOTAGE THAT MAY DISTURB SOME VIEWERS

The main hospital in the southern Syrian city of Sweida is overwhelmed with trauma patients and working without adequate power or water after the local Druze minority clashed almost two weeks ago with Bedouin and government forces.
